data.title: Brewing Caution: Jefferies Warms Up To Starbucks With Tepid Upgrade
data.description: Jefferies upgrades Starbucks to Hold with a $76 price target, citing a more reasonable valuation and ongoing turnaround efforts. Analyst Andy Barish highlights cultural challenges and slower earnings recovery, with upcoming quarters expected to offer clearer direction.

data.title: Jackson Finl Stock: A Deep Dive Into Analyst Perspectives (4 Ratings)
Smart Investors Are Watching These 3 ETFs After Surprise Jobs Data Beat
data.description: US jobs report for March was better-than-expected, renewing focus on some sector-specific ETFs. Healthcare, transportation, and food retail are timely opportunities.

data.title: BofA Slashes Delta Air Lines Estimates For 2025 And Beyond Amid Capacity, Revenue Challenges
data.description: B Of A analyst revised estimates for Delta Air Lines, Inc. following its Q1 results, with operating revenue growth of 2% and adjusted EPS of $0.46. Delta is not reaffirming its FY25 guidance and plans to provide an update later in the year. Analyst predicts flat capacity in H2 and lowers revenue growth forecast. EPS estimate for 2025 reduced to $5.20. Buy rating with price forecast of $56.
